components.selection_rule: After the canonical row-level file and license are supplied, prefer positions with repeated expert evidence, useful within-position quality spread, and source/style balance; create additional critiques where a selected position has fewer than four eligible critiques.
promotion_gates: position, critique, rating, and revision semantics audited
exact 50 position IDs frozen in a controlled manifest

components.selection_rule: Select exactly 20 positions only after the LMCA and protected-source inventories are available. Fill domain, attack-family, length, and source/style deficits first, then prefer positions that discriminate among frozen acquisition judges. Existing synthetic critiques remain unrated candidates until expert review.
promotion_gates: all 80 critiques receive new human-review provenance

components.selection_rule: Nominate all 30 upstream position records. Do not publish transformed item text, item IDs, critiques, or labels. Each position must pass independent source-fidelity and ambiguity/scope review before critique production. The human/model authorship mix for the four critiques is not yet approved.
promotion_gates: rights and jurisdiction review for cited editions
four versioned critiques produced per approved position
protected item and exposure manifests frozen

invariants: Each component critique count equals positions multiplied by four.
The public synthetic component cannot be represented as expert rated until new human-review provenance exists.
Protected item IDs, text, critiques, and labels are absent from public manifests.
Position is the split unit; sibling critiques never cross splits.
unresolved_parameters: Exact 50 LMCA position IDs and any additional critique acquisition plan.
Exact 20 public-synthetic position IDs, pending cross-source balance and difficulty screening.
Authorship mix and production method for 120 protected critiques.
Core expert-panel size, compensation, and committed capacity.
Adjudication capacity ceiling and pilot-derived trigger.
